subject: FW: taking Biden to court over the border

body:
Now the Open Border Lobby is attacking us.

Peter,

After our Party's Attorney General sued Joe Biden and Kamala
Harris for allowing criminal illegal immigrants to be released
into our communities, we've faced a massive wave of attacks from
the Open Borders Lobby.

But as the crisis at the southern border gets worse and our
nation faces a massive surge of illegal immigration, we know that
securing the border is more important than ever.

That's why we're going to unlock a 4X-MATCH to help us fend off
these attacks and continue the fight to secure the border.

Please make a contribution to help us fight back against attacks
from the Open Borders Lobby and secure our border -- and we'll
unlock a 4X-MATCH for the next hour.
(https://secure.winred.com/republican-party-of-florida/4e9a6242f71f3052?utm_campaign=20210324&utm_medium=email&utm_source=CI_B&utm_content=3)

Here's the truth: Democrats can't afford to lose a single seat in 2022.

But two of the senators who helped us flip the Senate in 2020 — Mark Kelly and Raphael Warnock — will have to defend their seats next year. Two others, Maggie Hassan and Catherine Cortez Masto, will also be in tough, must-win races. **We _must_ support these four senators NOW if we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands.**

**March 31st is a crucial FEC fundraising deadline for these senators. Will you make a split donation to help keep the Senate blue?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

But we know that to keep up this progress, it is essential that we re-elect all four Democratic Senators facing tough races next year.

**[Now we're asking you to keep the Senate blue — and passing major bills — by helping other Democratic Senators in tough races win their elections. Will you pitch in before the March 31st deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26944635/278535961/1829607327?refcode=ris_20210329_e_f_us_na_na_bundlingnd__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWUwM2EzYi01OTkxLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8q9KkFDA6TsU46jhoXS1DfR_jUpYfx5NxEWZCq68oE=)**

Mark Warner for Senate

name: Mark Bergman, Senior Advisor
subject: FW: Our first major deadline of 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
Friend,
The stakes could not be greater this November. I'll put it plainly, if we don't have the resources to turn out Democratic voters this fall, all of the progress we've made over the past four years could be reversed at the drop of a hat.
**[Please read Governor Northam 's message below and consider making a contribution to The Way Ahead's Virginia Future Fund before our quarterly reporting deadline tomorrow at midnight if you are able.](https://act.myngp.com/el/hW_9wBY-TkMfZe0ZGDoI2bq3A8Yb8O9z-EZ63oNgUNY=/P4myJgAn5M4DUhM3l7gTL6cg4Rghbh4KYyROzUfaCW8=)**
\- Mark Bergman, Senior Advisor

_Begin forwarded message:_
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hW_9wBY-TkMfZe0ZGDoI2bq3A8Yb8O9z-EZ63oNgUNY=/nQNZbgj8AaN3A1yyafYh7QnWkWf1MybGM-2L1PvP2g8=)
---
Friend, Under Democratic leadership in Virginia, we have passed historic gun safety legislation, repealed medically-unnecessary restrictions on women's healthcare, repealed racially discriminatory language in the Virginia Code, made Election Day a state holiday, and made Virginia the first Southern state to provide sweeping anti-discrimination protections for LGBTQ people. We are proud to be the third state in the nation to pass a ban on "no knock" warrants, and we have made monumental progress on criminal justice reform by becoming the first state in the South to abolish the death penalty. All of our progress is at stake if we don't protect our slim majority in the House this November, and our first major deadline of 2021 is on Wednesday. Simply put - I need your help. **[Please contribute to The Way Ahead 's Virginia Future Fund before our first quarter deadline so we can protect our Blue Majority!](https://act.myngp.com/el/hW_9wBY-TkMfZe0ZGDoI2bq3A8Yb8O9z-EZ63oNgUNY=/P4myJgAn5M4DUhM3l7gTL6cg4Rghbh4KYyROzUfaCW8=)** Let's keep the progress going. \- Ralph Northam

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hW_9wBY-TkMfZe0ZGDoI2bq3A8Yb8O9z-EZ63oNgUNY=/nQNZbgj8AaN3A1yyafYh7QnWkWf1MybGM-2L1PvP2g8=) Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/hW_9wBY-TkMfZe0ZGDoI2bq3A8Yb8O9z-EZ63oNgUNY=/hXDWB1EJs4NH1A8QlnIAjJpDpJHcMkzRPnsXalpTvFU=) |

name: Brittni McGuire
subject: Belinda's message
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw this email from WVDP Chairwoman Belinda Biafore. We still have until tomorrow night at midnight to reach our end-of-quarter goal, can you help? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Belinda Biafore < belinda@wvdemocrats. com [belinda@wvdemocrats.com] >

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Friend,
I hope this email finds you well.
I want to be as transparent as possible in explaining why I’m asking for your help today. So far this quarter, our email program has only raised $1,846.76 – and that’s just not where it should be. In the past we’ve had individual emails that have raised more than that. We feel that right now the WVDP is the strongest it’s ever been. Our Build Back Blue program has been an incredible success. We have an amazing staff and inspired volunteers. We are motivated, organized, and fired up. The only missing piece is our email fundraising. It seems to have fallen flat and we aren’t sure why. Our end of quarter deadline is coming up next week, and I’d love nothing more than to see this program reinvigorated.
Would you consider making a donation right now, even if it’s only for a dollar or two, and help us finish out this quarter with success? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you so much!
Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/belinda.jpg]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

name: EricaForUs.com
subject: We have just two days to get this done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
body:
Together, we'll build the movement that will give us a government that works for all of us, not just the wealthy and well-connected.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/q_sjsaLMtjDpUXfscEr3oP9wYYiZcdYlYAWOQjUynsY=/bGBCLfGu1huyNBi34rsQwHFiso4bkDPU5fWiHVHN4fo=?refcode=em20210330-1)
**Two days. $22,000.**
Midnight tomorrow is the end of the quarter. That doesn't mean a lot to most folks, but here's why it's a big deal to us:
Each quarter, campaigns like ours are required to file _public_ fundraising reports.
So, after tomorrow, everyone is going to see how much we've raised since we launched -- that includes all of our opponents and every political journalist and pundit in the country. They're going to use these numbers to gauge the strength of our movement and Erica's competitiveness as a candidate.
[**_We have to have a strong showing before midnight tomorrow. We need to show everyone that a grassroots, people-powered campaign can win. You can do your part to help out by chipping in what you can today._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/q_sjsaLMtjDpUXfscEr3oP9wYYiZcdYlYAWOQjUynsY=/bGBCLfGu1huyNBi34rsQwHFiso4bkDPU5fWiHVHN4fo=?refcode=em20210330-1)
**[Make your gift»](https://act.myngp.com/el/q_sjsaLMtjDpUXfscEr3oP9wYYiZcdYlYAWOQjUynsY=/bGBCLfGu1huyNBi34rsQwHFiso4bkDPU5fWiHVHN4fo=?refcode=em20210330-1)**
---
In addition to sending a powerful message, we need to hit that goal so that we have the resources we need to keep building our moral movement.
Our finance team says that, if we can raise **$22,000 by midnight tomorrow** , we'll be able to reach more voters, recruit more volunteers, make more phone calls, send more text messages, run more ads, and do everything we can to unite a diverse coalition of working North Carolinians behind Erica's bold platform for progress.
[**_$22,000 might seem like a lofty goal to hit but, if everyone reading this email chips in, we 'll get there in no time. Will you make your gift today and help us close the gap?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/q_sjsaLMtjDpUXfscEr3oP9wYYiZcdYlYAWOQjUynsY=/bGBCLfGu1huyNBi34rsQwHFiso4bkDPU5fWiHVHN4fo=?refcode=em20210330-1)
Together, we'll build the movement that will give us a government that works for all of us, not just the wealthy and well-connected.
Thanks,
Team Erica
**[Make your gift»](https://act.myngp.com/el/q_sjsaLMtjDpUXfscEr3oP9wYYiZcdYlYAWOQjUynsY=/bGBCLfGu1huyNBi34rsQwHFiso4bkDPU5fWiHVHN4fo=?refcode=em20210330-1)**

clean_body: "" "" Hey there, In just under 48 hours, we're closing the books on our first major FEC deadline of this campaign. Republicans will go through this report with a fine-toothed comb looking for any signs of weakness, and it could make or break our campaign. Mitch McConnell's super PAC and the Koch network are already spending big on attack ads. Falling short before tomorrow's deadline could invite more attacks, and could even convince right-wing Republicans like Kelly Ayotte to jump into this race. If Maggie Hassan loses in New Hampshire, Democrats will lose control of the Senate. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" Maggie only won by 1,017 votes in 2016 and back-to-back polls show her down by single digits. We need a strong showing in our first FEC report, or we risk falling further behind. Thank you so much for your support. -- Team Maggie ""

Thank you to everyone who has already chipped in to help us meet our critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal! It’s our first major fundraising deadline since Joe Biden and the rest of the Democrats took over total control in Washington, so it’s extremely important that everyone help.

If you haven’t donated yet, or if you’d like to help some more, we still have 24 hours to go until our MIDNIGHT deadline on March 31st.

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Ruin April 1 for Pelosi and Schumer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57080881:6yaU4MuyN:m:1:3253819041:876817876C3453C971401B1CDFD9E204:r "April Fools") Peter, We have a HUGE opportunity. We have a chance to RUIN April 1st for Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, the Squad, and really every liberal in Washington who thinks that the America First movement died when President Trump left office. **They are CERTAIN that they have us beaten - but you and I are going to send them a very surprising wakeup call on April 1.** We have a critical deadline on March 31st at midnight. The FEC requires me to report all donations to my campaign, and it will be my first one since **I stood up for the integrity of our nation 's election and the left began their attempts to cancel me.** **[The radical left and the media predicted it would be the end of my political career- but if you make your donation before this deadline, we will show them that our movement is stronger and ready to keep the flame of liberty alive.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57080881:6yaU4MuyN:m:1:3253819041:876817876C3453C971401B1CDFD9E204:r "The radical left and the media predicted it
would be the end of my political career – but if you make your donation before this deadline, we will show them that our movement is stronger
and ready to keep the flame of liberty alive.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57080881:6yaU4MuyN:m:1:3253819041:876817876C3453C971401B1CDFD9E204:r "Deadline") | | [DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57080881:6yaU4MuyN:m:1:3253819041:876817876C3453C971401B1CDFD9E204:r "DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE")
---
We are building a movement, and movements are terrifying to the establishment because once they get going...they can't be stopped.
The Left will break the bank trying to come after me and any other patriot that supports me. **We are counting on you.[Please send your support for everything we stand for before this deadline. Any amount from $5 to the Federal Maximum Amount of $2,900 is greatly appreciated.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57080881:6yaU4MuyN:m:1:3253819041:876817876C3453C971401B1CDFD9E204:r "Please send your support for
everything we stand for before this deadline. Any amount from $5 to the Federal Maximum Amount of $2,900 is greatly appreciated.")**
The fight may be long, but our nation is worth fighting for, and I refuse to give up.
**[Will you stand with me in this movement before it is too late?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57080881:6yaU4MuyN:m:1:3253819041:876817876C3453C971401B1CDFD9E204:r "Will you stand with me in this movement before it is too late?")**

name: Kimberly Fletcher
subject: Moms Take on the U.S. Senate
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57081975:6zeQUMupN:m:1:3253819041:B55250FA9617D6726EB4C971F262450E:r "Headline") Peter, The Biden Administration has made it their calling to destroy Democracy in America, and it is up to use to save it. **This fight will not be easy, and it will not be cheap, but We can no longer sit back and watch them destroy the very foundation of our Democracy with the travesty known as HR1.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57081975:6zeQUMupN:m:1:3253819041:B55250FA9617D6726EB4C971F262450E:r "Timer")My name is Kimberley Fletcher - I am the founder and President of Moms for America Action, and we have a plan to influence key lawmakers and save our nation from becoming a permanent, socialist nightmare. **[Moms for America Action is leading the fight, but we need to know you have our backs before midnight on March 31st if we are going to continue the pressure on key members of the U.S. Senate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57081975:6zeQUMupN:m:1:3253819041:B55250FA9617D6726EB4C971F262450E:r "Moms for America Action is leading the fight, but we need to know
you have our backs before midnight on March 31st if we are going to continue the pressure on key members of the U.S. Senate.")** Here is where we are so far:
* We have hired a project manager on the ground.
* Launched a national, digital media effort.
* Scheduled rally dates at Senate district offices in all three states for Tuesday, Thursday and Saturday for the next three weeks.
* Made several calls to DC offices to schedule meetings with the Senators.
* Created initial plan for press conference at U.S. Capitol, and
* Created a database to track volunteers in each state.

**These are only the first steps in a HUGE plan to stop HR1 in its tracks, but we can 't execute if we don't have your support before the end of this quarter.** | | [DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57081975:6zeQUMupN:m:1:3253819041:B55250FA9617D6726EB4C971F262450E:r "DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE")
---
If we sit back, if we do nothing, if we allow the liberals to dictate our actions, they will take our nation from us - nothing scares a liberal more than a Conservative voter!
They are defunding the police, cancelling gender, funding abortions and extending the lockdowns - if we let them take away our right to vote, _we won 't be able to stop any of it._
**[The fight has already started, the only question is what side will you be on? Stand with us and make your donation before this critical deadline.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57081975:6zeQUMupN:m:1:3253819041:B55250FA9617D6726EB4C971F262450E:r "The fight has already started, the only question is what side
will you be on? Stand with us and make your donation before this critical deadline.")**
Please don't wait. It's almost too late.
God bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57081975:6zeQUMupN:m:1:3253819041:B55250FA9617D6726EB4C971F262450E:r "Kimberly Fletcher")
Kimberly Fletcher
President & Founder - Moms for America Action
P.S. If every conservative reading this message donated just $45, we would have everything we need to mobilize moms in America and push back Joe Biden's socialist agenda. **[Please donate today and help us meet our goal!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57081975:6zeQUMupN:m:1:3253819041:B55250FA9617D6726EB4C971F262450E:r "Please donate today and help us
meet our goal!")**
| [DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57081975:6zeQUMupN:m:1:3253819041:B55250FA9617D6726EB4C971F262450E:r "DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE")

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Holding onto the majority
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

This year continues to be a hard and challenging year for everyone. The good news is that the Democrats finally hold the White House and Congress and we have taken steps to help crush the coronavirus and rebuild our economy.

Under the Biden Administration, we are slowly beginning to return to normal life, and have the opportunity to make real and positive change across our nation. But this will take time, and we only have a slim majority in the Senate. We must work together if we are going to hold the majority.

Our first FEC deadline since democrats took the majority is tomorrow, and all eyes are on us. body:
They have a syringe with your name on it. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us15.campaign-archive.com/?e=3e017fab0f&u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=effa272ae4)
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=cad9014414&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | Dear Friend, The totalitarian mindset of the Democrat Party is _breathtaking_.
Multiple reports say that the Biden Administration is working to develop mandatory vaccine "passports" or "travel passes."
Our families didn't come to this great country legally in order to have Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Anthony Fauci, tell us we can't travel without undergoing forced vaccinations.
**What's next?**
Will Americans be tied down and vaccinated against their will while the Communist Democrats work to end fair elections, eliminate the Second Amendment, and open the border to illegal aliens who aren't even vaccinated?
## We are truly living in insane times.
But that's why our race for governor is so critically important.
Our efforts to take back Congress in 2022 and take back the Presidency in 2024 begin this year in New Jersey where we can generate the momentum we need to WIN!
**President Trump showed us just how deep and treacherous the Swamp really is.**
Now we have to resolve to drain it once and for all.
As the next Governor of New Jersey, I'll fight with every fiber of my being to protect our Constitutional rights.
**No American should live in fear of forced vaccinations or mandatory "vaccine passports."**
In New Jersey, this much I can promise: **vaccine passports will be issued over my dead, brown body!**
Join my campaign today to send a message: no forced vaccines and no vaccine passports!
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
Republican for NJ Governor
## _For the People_
**P.S.** New Jersey's motto is "Liberty and Prosperity." But forced vaccinations and mandatory vaccine passports would mean our liberty is lost forever. Stand with me and send a message to Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Anthony Fauci: **Keep your syringes to yourself!**
---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Biden-Made Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/vJsNbOMusN

Peter:

Democrats won't let kids go to school or restaurants open at 100%
capacity, but they don't seem to care about COVID-19 when it
comes to illegal migrants crossing the border.

Why?

The answer simple: their priorities are wrong. They care more
about illegal migrants than hard-working American families.

That's why I'm working with the House Freedom Fund to elect
principled conservative leaders to Congress.

You see, electing just any Republican isn't good enough -
especially when it comes to securing our nation's borders. Some
Republicans even want to work with the Democrats to pass amnesty.

This can't happen! We need strong conservatives who will keep
their word and fight for our principles.

Please join me in supporting the House Freedom Fund and their
priority candidates with a generous contribution.
(https://secure.housefreedomfund.com/xyb3i/d?c=895b97a9f0fc28fc19699405dc1c46db)

They are helping conservatives like U.S. Reps. Lauren Boebert
(R-CO), Yvette Herrell (R-NM), and Scott Perry (R-PA).

We need their leadership in Washington now more than ever.

The Biden Administration has released migrants into our
neighborhoods without a court date and is using our tax dollars
to pay for illegal migrants to stay in hotels.

And the Democrats have no plan to fix any of it!

President Biden refuses to visit the border, House Democrats
refuse to hold hearings, and the media refuses to hold them
accountable.

Please help us fight back by supporting principled conservatives.
(https://secure.housefreedomfund.com/xyb3i/d?c=895b97a9f0fc28fc19699405dc1c46db)

Together, we can secure our borders and make America great again.

Sincerely,
Image

JIM JORDAN

U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio

END OF MONTH DEADLINE
motionmailapp.com
ELECT TRUE CONSERVATIVES
(https://secure.housefreedomfund.com/xyb3i/d?c=895b97a9f0fc28fc19699405dc1c46db)
DONATE NOW
(https://secure.housefreedomfund.com/xyb3i/d?c=895b97a9f0fc28fc19699405dc1c46db)
Image

House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action
committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S.
House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are
dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who
support policies that promote the liberty, safety, and prosperity
for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as
charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each

Joe Biden referred to us Mississippians as “neanderthals” for wanting to open our schools and businesses. Now, he wants to lock our state down. **We cannot allow Joe Biden to use his overreaching executive power to tell us what to do.** [**Keep Mississippi _OPEN_**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=d3c7b34608624e73a068a1ba99a98c5b&_e=-B73lGIro3iegUgDSgrz91vYafX5cHKxCljeHQV6oc1JJ36_amp8H-sDN4A9xwr3NxTyBQ1kuXeLBr4Ck45j1AKXWpfZ64722D5SJn0GekpCR3_dq-nKzfWSr4qvOAePyWR9jB419tYnEA_Hm97Y0UewL7ye6iLsusXVh03h-r3Fgo02jAZv3g_GswyZhkZIykiPashf2Rw4Wdrs_5kBsAmHdFApd4Mtr-GYVDvBgZDCrNPi8PLCL40ntsfgLBJuVBb4XF-vcGx2-rVn2Pifk6_Dvr9AzHE-vvVrTrVX2YIH4CYeeszvjUsTrS_GbQtCuIl2r-9AOdH8ldd2fY8kWOqql70YdQtH-8aNJDSMyh0__NNJefLPAOXv73fDGUgak_7tcjoGD5v5WRkPc-hUtxnak8jzBJR9Q65jcbuQvaE%3D) _**We know how to operate our own state better than Joe Biden knows what's best for us.**_

body:
for top conservatives only | |
---
| | Did you see this email from Doc?

The End of Quarter fundraising deadline is **TOMORROW** at midnight. This is the FIRST major deadline we’ve faced since Doc got to the U.S. Senate. If we don’t reach our goal, the Democrats and their pals in the media and Big Tech will know it.

[**Please help us stop that from becoming a reality — click here to chip in $75, $50, or even just $2.50 **](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=985b6baa95&e=0b94e583bc)

**Doc is fighting for _us_ in the U.S. Senate. **He’s fighting for election integrity, our way of life, and against the woke left — but he’s counting on YOU to stand with him now.

Democrats **_have already raised millions_** to attack conservatives like Doc and **_keep their power_**.

The road to stopping them begins with this deadline — **so, please, step up and stand with us now before it’s too late.[Click here to chip in $75, $50, or even just $2.50.](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=914b69c121&e=0b94e583bc) **

We’re counting on you.

Team Marshall

**BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:**
---
| [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=4568c9b614&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| | Since I’ve been in the U.S. Senate...

Josh Hawley, Ted Cruz, and I stood for **_election integrity_** and fair elections. **_I took on Joe Biden’s ridiculous executive order_** letting boys play girls’ sports. I went to the southern border to see the **_Biden Border Crisis_** firsthand.

**As a result,** the Swamp, the woke left, and their allies in the media have attacked me. Countless corporations have refused to give me future donations... _because I’ve stood for our conservative values and done what I said I’d do._

That’s just fine by me. I ran to be a conservative voice for Kansans and all Americans — not another tool of the Swamp.

**Now, we’re at another critical moment. We’re just over 48 hours out from our _first_ End of Quarter fundraising deadline of 2021... and I’ve set a goal of raising another $40,000 to meet the moment.**
[**Will you stand with me?**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=f7ed3cd588&e=0b94e583bc)
---
|
---
| [DONATE $100 »](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=cb631bad0f&e=0b94e583bc "DONATE $100 »")
---
| [DONATE $50 »](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=f208bf8cab&e=0b94e583bc "DONATE $50 »")
---
| [DONATE $20.22 »](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=5c65d643bb&e=0b94e583bc "DONATE $20.22 »")
---
| When the deadline passes, our fundraising numbers will go public.

You can bet Democrats and the woke left will be watching. _They’ll know if we fall short._

So, it’s even more critical that we meet this moment, **Every donation sends them a message, and every donation will help kickstart our fight to win back the Senate majority in 2022.**

Supporters like you powered our campaign and you’re powering our efforts to stop Biden and the Democrats’ insane agenda now. We’re counting on you.

[**Please, if you can, chip in now.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=e9fb1f8c48&e=0b94e583bc)

Senator Roger Marshall
---
| [DONATE $20.22 »](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=86f5f00891&e=0b94e583bc "DONATE $20.22 »")

| Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=0799cdc67c&e=0b94e583bc&c=59513b3a47).

The far-left will do whatever it takes to stop us. == == == Leslie Rutledge Paid for by Rutledge for Governor PO Box 144 Little Rock, AR 72203 Contributions to Leslie Rutledge for Governor are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes. Our critical End-Of-Quarter fundraising deadline is almost here and we are already falling behind the Democrats' fundraising machine.

**Team Scott is activating a 3X MATCH for all donations made before the End-Of-Quarter deadline.**
[Donate Now: 3X MATCH](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/3x-march/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210330_TY.100609_team-scott_t1054715-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210330_donate-3x-match-before-deadline)
---

clean_body: Things don't look good right now. == ***SPECIAL ELECTION UPDATE* == Friend, We just got done with our end-of-the-quarter fundraising meeting for the upcoming special election in Texas. And to be honest... we need your help. The Democrats are raising tons of money and we are still behind with only hours left to go before the biggest fundraising deadline we've had yet. == Jake asked us to reach out to every conservative we could find to try to make up ground as fast as we can. If we don't have the resources to compete, we won't be able to build the momentum necessary to WIN back the House majority. == == == == Thanks for your support, Team Ellzey Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress. PO BOX 341027 Austin, TX 78734 Jake Ellzey retired from the U.S. Navy. subject: Democrats are out of control
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress
body:
Our nation's future is at stake.

Friend, this is Steve Scalise.
**Radical Democrats are pulling out all of the stops to force their far-left, Socialist agenda on America.**
The Biden Administration has been pushing to open our borders, implement the radical "Green New Deal", and defund our police.

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Working together to Keep America Safe
body:
Patriot Beth Van Duyne is fighting to protect our borders
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018RihR0Yw74LT6RQmYxoH_tyoSA5dxnW-bfUT4YhzDoOOD8OngzBzvpfaisPbcUhCnBdr9DAHOprqdbtylIkSJU4QcFQgxlrTdyJUlZAOCivgWDlZioWC1P2CxLUHC0S-8I3nNsz3_l-kG8RrXJqkvPz68GTz2QL7QKYe4UlaWLQfACjluDNRQQ==&c=dt_0XzUlcnCDxaf5Bqj6VrjnHp2cY_UV3xJxwRJk4-qPgmHD3kms8A==&ch=MpsPCJtlMDvFbI0tfa0NykI-8imLSdRhGkhbGdJYCC3BW3qICdAq9g==&jrc=1)
---
| Patriot,
After being elected to Congress in November, I joined a record number of Republican women in the House. My fellow freshman Republican Beth Van Duyne, the pride of North Texas, is one of these strong women. She is working hard for our conservative movement to ensure our values and constitutional rights are secure.
A single working mother of two, Beth is standing up to the far-left agenda being pursued in Washington. We are making a stand together to reject the Biden Administration's radical open borders agenda for America because the American people should be our first priority.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018RihR0Yw74LT6RQmYxoH_tyoSA5dxnW-bfUT4YhzDoOOD8OngzBzvpfaisPbcUhCnBdr9DAHOprqdbtylIkSJU4QcFQgxlrTdyJUlZAOCivgWDlZioWC1P2CxLUHC0S-8I3nNsz3_l-kG8RrXJqkvPz68GTz2QL7QKYe4UlaWLQfACjluDNRQQ==&c=dt_0XzUlcnCDxaf5Bqj6VrjnHp2cY_UV3xJxwRJk4-qPgmHD3kms8A==&ch=MpsPCJtlMDvFbI0tfa0NykI-8imLSdRhGkhbGdJYCC3BW3qICdAq9g==&jrc=1)
---
| | | [HELP US SECURE OUR SOUTHERN BORDER](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018RihR0Yw74LT6RQmYxoH_tyoSA5dxnW-bfUT4YhzDoOOD8OngzBzvpfaisPbcUhCnBdr9DAHOprqdbtylIkSJU4QcFQgxlrTdyJUlZAOCivgWDlZioWC1P2CxLUHC0S-8I3nNsz3_l-kG8RrXJqkvPz68GTz2QL7QKYe4UlaWLQfACjluDNRQQ==&c=dt_0XzUlcnCDxaf5Bqj6VrjnHp2cY_UV3xJxwRJk4-qPgmHD3kms8A==&ch=MpsPCJtlMDvFbI0tfa0NykI-8imLSdRhGkhbGdJYCC3BW3qICdAq9g==&jrc=1)
---
| The Biden Administration and the liberals in Congress are supporting open borders. Through executive orders, critical mistakes, and lack of leadership, there is now a crisis at our southern border.
Thousands of illegal immigrants are flooding our borders during a pandemic, and Biden is mandating that Border Patrol process them and allow them into America. In other words, open borders - which expose our country's security.
As Beth says, the "Biden Administration is the best friend the drug cartels and human smugglers have ever had."
We will stand up to the radicals in Washington and help to secure our borders. It is imperative for the safety of our families and communities. [Can Beth and I count on you to support us to stop the radical open borders agenda?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018RihR0Yw74LT6RQmYxoH_tyoSA5dxnW-bfUT4YhzDoOOD8OngzBzvpfaisPbcUhCnBdr9DAHOprqdbtylIkSJU4QcFQgxlrTdyJUlZAOCivgWDlZioWC1P2CxLUHC0S-8I3nNsz3_l-kG8RrXJqkvPz68GTz2QL7QKYe4UlaWLQfACjluDNRQQ==&c=dt_0XzUlcnCDxaf5Bqj6VrjnHp2cY_UV3xJxwRJk4-qPgmHD3kms8A==&ch=MpsPCJtlMDvFbI0tfa0NykI-8imLSdRhGkhbGdJYCC3BW3qICdAq9g==&jrc=1)
---
| | | [SUPPORT STRONG BORDERS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018RihR0Yw74LT6RQmYxoH_tyoSA5dxnW-bfUT4YhzDoOOD8OngzBzvpfaisPbcUhCnBdr9DAHOprqdbtylIkSJU4QcFQgxlrTdyJUlZAOCivgWDlZioWC1P2CxLUHC0S-8I3nNsz3_l-kG8RrXJqkvPz68GTz2QL7QKYe4UlaWLQfACjluDNRQQ==&c=dt_0XzUlcnCDxaf5Bqj6VrjnHp2cY_UV3xJxwRJk4-qPgmHD3kms8A==&ch=MpsPCJtlMDvFbI0tfa0NykI-8imLSdRhGkhbGdJYCC3BW3qICdAq9g==&jrc=1)
---
| | | [HELP BETH AND I CONTINUE OUR MISSION](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018RihR0Yw74LT6RQmYxoH_tyoSA5dxnW-bfUT4YhzDoOOD8OngzBzvpfaisPbcUhCnBdr9DAHOprqdbtylIkSJU4QcFQgxlrTdyJUlZAOCivgWDlZioWC1P2CxLUHC0S-8I3nNsz3_l-kG8RrXJqkvPz68GTz2QL7QKYe4UlaWLQfACjluDNRQQ==&c=dt_0XzUlcnCDxaf5Bqj6VrjnHp2cY_UV3xJxwRJk4-qPgmHD3kms8A==&ch=MpsPCJtlMDvFbI0tfa0NykI-8imLSdRhGkhbGdJYCC3BW3qICdAq9g==&jrc=1)

For America,

My fellow freshman Republican Beth Van Duyne, the pride of North Texas, is one of these strong women. She is working hard for our conservative movement to ensure our values and constitutional rights are secure. A single working mother of two, Beth is standing up to the far-left agenda being pursued in Washington. We are making a stand together to reject the Biden Administration's radical open borders agenda for America because the American people should be our first priority. | | | | | The Biden Administration and the liberals in Congress are supporting open borders. Through executive orders, critical mistakes, and lack of leadership, there is now a crisis at our southern border. Thousands of illegal immigrants are flooding our borders during a pandemic, and Biden is mandating that Border Patrol process them and allow them into America. In other words, open borders - which expose our country's security. As Beth says, the "Biden Administration is the best friend the drug cartels and human smugglers have ever had." We will stand up to the radicals in Washington and help to secure our borders. It is imperative for the safety of our families and communities. | | | | | | | Thanks for your support! For America, | | Kat Cammack | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

subject: re: Some quick math
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
We know you've received *a bunch* of emails by now, so we'll keep this super short and sweet:
**Our team just did some quick math, and in order to reach our end-of-quarter goal of $500,000 in the next ~30ish hours, we just need 27 more people from your ZIP code to chip in.**
**[_If you 're willing to be one of them, please use this link to donate $25 or any amount that fits your budget right now. We're *SO* close, but we can't get there without you._](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=c27f7c0f53&e=0490676c9f)**
**[Contribute $25](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=bf97fc821f&e=0490676c9f)**
All eyes are on our campaign. Whether we like it or not, reporters and pundits will pore over our FEC report as soon as it's released to the public. They'll use it to gauge our campaign's momentum and to determine if we've got a real shot at flipping this seat blue in 2022.
Big numbers = good headlines that will propel us forward. Disappointing numbers? Well, we won't even go there. **Long story short, we just have to reach this goal before we close the books on Q1.**
**[_Can you be one of the 27 more donors we need from your ZIP code to get us over the finish line before tomorrow 's deadline by donating $25?_](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=f405ee1616&e=0490676c9f)**
Thank you for doing your part. 🙏
-- All of us at Team Fetterman HQ

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zephyr=20Teachout?=
subject: TODAY @ 2PM ET: Breaking Up Health Care Monopolies w/ Rep. Cori Bush, Economic Liberties & People's Action
body:
The Latest Event in the Break 'Em Up Series

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/f36630e2043e/join-rep-cori-bush-me-economic-liberties-peoples-action-for-the-next-break-em-up-event-5073348?e=e870238275)
WATCH HERE (https://youtu.be/0K8R2CxLUFI)

COVID-19 has levied a heavy toll on the health of our country over the past year, particularly for communities of color. Some of the challenges in managing the pandemic are because of our reliance on a private insurance system, which impacts access and costs of care. But poor outcomes, high costs, and lack of access are caused or exacerbated by a problem that policymakers could begin to address today—unchecked monopoly power.

Long before the pandemic, from hospitals to Big Pharma to medical supplies, the extreme market power of large corporations that put profits over people hurt patients, health care workers, and communities. If we don't break these giants up, these monopolies will continue using their power to limit access to care and create medical deserts, while raising costs, lowering quality of care, and abusing health care workers.

On March 30 at 2:00 p.m. ET, please join Economic Liberties, People’s Action, Congresswoman Cori Bush (MO-01), and leading experts and advocates to learn why we need leaders at all levels of government to fight corporate health care monopolies to make our health care system more equitable and resilient. This is the second event in our Break ‘Em Up: Redistributing Power to the People series, which highlights how progressives can organize around anti-monopoly fights to advance economic and racial justice. The first (https://www.economicliberties.us/event/break-em-up-redistributing-economic-power-to-the-people/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) focused on how to center worker rights in corporate power fights.

Date: March 30, 2021

Time: 2:00 - 3:30 PM ET
WATCH HERE (https://youtu.be/0K8R2CxLUFI)

Opening Remarks:

Sarah Miller (https://www.economicliberties.us/sarah-miller/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Executive Director, American Economic Liberties Project

Keynote Remarks:

Congresswoman Cori Bush (MO-01) (https://bush.house.gov/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , member of the House Judiciary and Oversight and Reform Committees

2:15pm - Panel 1: How Health Care Monopolies Worsened the Impact of COVID-19

Jean Ross (https://www.nationalnursesunited.org/about?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , RN, President, National Nurses United

Abdul El Sayed (http://abdulelsayed.com/about?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Physician, Epidemiologist, Former City Health Commissioner, Progressive Activist, Author of The Incision (https://incision.substack.com/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) and Medicare for All: A Citizen’s Guide (http://medicareforallbook.com/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) & host of the podcast “America Dissected.”

Zephyr Teachout (https://www.fordham.edu/info/23186/zephyr_teachout?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Professor, Fordham Law School and author of Break 'Em Up: Recovering Our Freedom from Big Ag, Big Tech, and Big Money (https://us.macmillan.com/books/9781250200891?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}})

Moderated by Morgan Harper (https://www.economicliberties.us/morgan-harper/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Senior Advisor, American Economic Liberties Project

2:45pm - Panel 2: Solutions to Tackle Monopoly Power in the Health Care Industry

Lisa Frank (https://www.uniteforpa.com/meet_lisa_frank?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Executive Vice President and Director of Strategic Campaigns, SEIU PA

Olivia Webb (https://www.economicliberties.us/olivia-webb/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Senior Policy Analyst, American Economic Liberties Project

Mike Bowen (https://www.dallasnews.com/news/2020/05/14/two-years-ago-mike-bowen-of-prestige-ameritech-warned-of-n-95-mask-shortages-heres-what-he-said/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Executive Vice President, Prestige Ameritech

Moderated by George Goehl (https://peoplesaction.org/about/george-goehl-executive-director/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Director, People’s Action

Closing Remarks:

Morgan Harper (https://www.economicliberties.us/morgan-harper/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Senior Advisor, American Economic Liberties Project

Additional Resources from Economic Liberties:

Courage to Learn: Health Care, (https://www.economicliberties.us/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/Courage-to-Learn_HealthCare_Designed_1.11.pdf?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) American Economic Liberties Project

“A Shot in the Arm: How Government Succeed in Coronavirus Vaccine Development, and Failed in Distribution (https://prospect.org/coronavirus/shot-in-the-arm-coronavirus-vaccine-development/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) ,” The American Prospect

Acute Condition (https://www.acutecondition.com/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , newsletter by Economic Liberties’ Olivia Webb

About the “Break ‘Em Up” Series:

Economic Liberties and People's Action's “Break ‘Em Up!” series brings together a diverse range of progressive voices to share information about the ways unchecked corporate power is hurting workers, small businesses, communities, and our democracy. Watch our previous event on taking on monopolies to strengthen worker power, featuring Senator Bernie Sanders, here (https://www.economicliberties.us/event/break-em-up-redistributing-economic-power-to-the-people/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) .
WATCH HERE (https://youtu.be/0K8R2CxLUFI)

============================================================

American Economic Liberties Project
1150 Connecticut Ave NW Ste 800

USA

You can ** update your preferences (https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=3cbabd4dc2&e=e870238275&c=ee5b41b616)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=3cbabd4dc2&e=e870238275&c=ee5b41b616)

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Protect the Grand Canyon from uranium mining
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Every
body:
Peter,
I'm asking you to take action today to help protect one of the Natural Wonders of the World.
Full of stunning natural beauty, endangered species, and home to tribal communities, [**the Grand Canyon is a national treasure worthy of protecting >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26967503/278619280/1727851968?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3ZGU4YzlkLTkzOTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nK1MYTp7cetKx67JlnYQtQQ2eTqBcPALUpaX5Prp-i0=&emci=6600d5f9-9291-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=87de8c9d-9391-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26967504/278619281/1727851968?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3ZGU4YzlkLTkzOTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nK1MYTp7cetKx67JlnYQtQQ2eTqBcPALUpaX5Prp-i0=&emci=6600d5f9-9291-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=87de8c9d-9391-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230)
---
Not only is the Canyon a special place for those who live and visit, it's critical to sustaining life in the region, providing tens of millions of Americans with water.
But mining – particularly _uranium mining_ – threatens it all. Wealthy special interests want to see the current moratorium on mining expire. [**We can't let that happen >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26967505/278619282/1727851968?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3ZGU4YzlkLTkzOTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nK1MYTp7cetKx67JlnYQtQQ2eTqBcPALUpaX5Prp-i0=&emci=6600d5f9-9291-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=87de8c9d-9391-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230)
I'm committed to this fight and I hope you are, too.
Sincerely,
_– Kirsten_

* * *
**Meet Kirsten Engel**
Specializing in environmental law, State Senator Kirsten Engel has taught at some of America's most prestigious law schools, such as Tulane, Vanderbilt, and Harvard. She now teaches at the University of Arizona, where she served as Associate Dean and Director of the Environmental Law Program.
Kirsten is running for Congress to help working families and small businesses to not only recover from the global pandemic, but also take that next step to building a sustainable economy with opportunities for all. In Congress, Kirsten will fight for clean energy, gun safety, and will work to clear pathways to citizenship for our immigrant communities.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a6/2a380d31/26d35e11/f07c6d/1559192291/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a6/2a380d31/26d35e11/f07c6d/1559192291/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to my campaign. But first, I'd like to take a minute to explain why your support is so crucial in this race.
From day one, we knew it would be a tough fight to keep this seat. I only won my last race by 1,017 votes -- a fraction of a percent. Now, Democrats have a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, and you can bet that Mitch McConnell is doing whatever it takes to get the GOP back in power.
Tomorrow's FEC deadline is the first big test of our campaign's momentum. **I 'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to get us over the finish line. [If you can, please chip in $3 or more to keep New Hampshire blue, protect our Senate majority, and defend our progress.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a6/2a380d31/26d35e11/f07c6e/1559192291/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMF9lb3EyX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210330_eoq2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
I got into public service to take on tough fights and get results for the people of New Hampshire. I was proud to cast crucial votes in the Senate to save the Affordable Care Act and pass the American Rescue Plan. But now, I'm the Republicans' number one target.
In a race as close as ours in a state as purple as New Hampshire, every dollar makes a tremendous difference -- and it could be the deciding factor between holding on to this vulnerable seat or losing it to Republicans. [**That 's why I'm humbly asking you today to support my campaign by chipping in $3 or more right now.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a6/2a380d31/26d35e11/f07c6e/1559192291/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMF9lb3EyX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210330_eoq2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a6/2a380d31/26d35e11/f07c6f/1559192291/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMF9lb3EyX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UVNCOWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210330_eoq2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a6/2a380d31/26d35e11/f07c68/1559192291/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMF9lb3EyX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210330_eoq2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a6/2a380d31/26d35e11/f07c69/1559192291/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMF9lb3EyX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210330_eoq2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8a6/2a380d31/26d35e11/f07c6e/1559192291/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMzMF9lb3EyX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210330_eoq2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
I hope you know how truly grateful I am to have you on my team. Thank you for being with me in this fight.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Can I count on you to help save 2,600 jobs in Georgia?
body:
| |
---
At Tea Party Patriots Action, we have been concerned with the rise of corporate political activism. The growth of so-called ESG investing (Environmental, Social and Corporate Governance), has brought on a wave of “woke capitalism.” Multi-national corporations like Coca-Cola and Amazon are donating millions to radical groups and pushing leftist social and political agendas.

**We have been an active member of a coalition to fight this trend, and we encourage you to visit the new coalition website [StopCorporateTyranny.org](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg5LTZiZTIyZWNlZjFmODRkMTg4ZGYzZjU1Zjk1OGNhNjQ2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3RvcGNvcnBvcmF0ZXR5cmFubnkub3JnLz9taWQ9NDM1NzEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=C4cMAr1HESAXJrYmPEiYuA).** We also encourage you to join their email list so you can get updates on these dangerous developments and what you can do to push back against the left's weaponization of corporate America. **You can [sign up here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDg5LTZiZTIyZWNlZjFmODRkMTg4ZGYzZjU1Zjk1OGNhNjQ2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3RvcGNvcnBvcmF0ZXR5cmFubnkub3JnL3NpZ251cD9taWQ9NDM1NzEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=gUxSX2lb1J0M-cCotH24eQ).**

In liberty,

Jenny Beth
|

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Terrorist buys a gun . . . while Americans can’t
body:
The more I find out about Ahmad Al Aliwi Alissa, the more I’m outraged.
---
For the second year, this will be a tough Passover and Easter for all Americans.
| | | | Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/_0SY24CQpcIq7BpP91o6gkbwuSZNMN8y7g1ellxQ5xF0wdykuoRw9wiFa1moSOTn6-Oi-mrbj8NF3ZV7zLVrFd8CwhkFYQ8SB3Vu6EDLU7P4fTFEw9MrQiA4-Xq1WLJV2QpZDGEs8l5L493R1BHCOoecA9-XaNhKCCMaqwpPqNWnpeXGx3rh9VhDtVr2_GG_tAnjUderK0qQE_QpBhyBBdkz8kzKdLcPHd_u6C0ms0QyZzojyPpukXbfV4oI-WLPAUwNP8p7bJRtyQdYG5YWyyEWekdT2LLHsAyCNR0) The more I find out about Ahmad Al Aliwi Alissa, the more I’m outraged.

Alissa murdered 10 people at a Kosher supermarket in Boulder, Colorado last week.

Just six days before he killed men and women in cold blood, Alissa passed an FBI background check and purchased a firearm.

And get this . . . **Alissa was known to the FBI and linked to another person under investigation by the bureau**.

That’s on top of Alissa being convicted of assault for “cold cocking” a high school student who offended him by saying something “racial.”

But let’s set all that aside and talk about Colorado’s Red Flag laws.

On January 1st, 2020, Colorado’s Red Flag laws came into effect.

The law gives family or household members the ability to ask a court for an Extreme Risk Protection Order (ERPO).

And while Alissa’s family was quick to use mental illness as an excuse for his murderous rampage, they did nothing DESPITE knowing the risk . . . and they admitted to it.

Before the murders, Alissa’s sister-in-law admitted to seeing the young man “fiddling” with his gun and that the family became upset and took the rifle away from him.

Yet the same man the family described as “paranoid” and “mentally ill” had the gun back in time to commit mass murder two days later.

While they’re quick to blame Alissa’s “mental illness” now that 10 people are dead, the family took no steps to request an ERPO.

Using Colorado’s Red Flag laws, they had the power to stop Alissa – but they refused.

So both the FBI’s National Instant Background Check System and a brand new Red Flag law did nothing at all to stop a mass murder.

That’s because gun control legislation isn’t designed to stop crime and the murder of innocent people . . . **it’s designed to disarm as much as the population as possible – especially those who abide by the law**.

This is another reason why I’m suing to get my Second Amendment rights back – that were stripped from me because of my political activism.

I want to expose the FBI’s system that is not only ineffective, but has become a political tool of the Deep State.

[**Help me do that today by donating to support my lawsuit.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/kETgMrUwQa_1_gJPRWTzDqQmduyMeTisxODznkT6NMvTGfboWJBC0oOrpMAHUDJBHf2Vr9lT17XX7g-Q5Gbic9kyNDfFIh8VNVST1SaRaHOskcg1lekL0z6oGz6A-MeHYSH0oNSDwdDfLgmla3uw5m0hY5NSL6ByGNVwMQG8SFu6mF3mK9-nDtaODq2LdFdN8qFtZXSZnyCNtcjbOH4xrIeDaHfYZgBO7XZlXO_1DxtfMFSlzvUKx1R7XqYNmyx25ibyagr9zJxah3SQnSkBjxMD9b4ej4GLQgcub0c)

While Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have been swift to call for and pass new unconstitutional gun control measures, all they’re doing is giving the government more power to crack down on all of us.

NONE of their measures have or will prevent mass shootings. Just take a look at the other mass murderers who have passed background checks. Alissa wasn’t alone in being “missed” by the FBI while also, ironically, being known to the FBI.

Another recent mass murderer, Robert Long, had passed his FBI background check on the same day he gunned down eight people in Atlanta.

The ONLY thing that will curb mass shootings is by allowing more good people to purchase and carry a firearm for their own protection.

Biden and Pelosi’s plan will lead to more deaths, while terrorists like Alissa have more gun rights than me and other law-abiding citizens.

[**Help me fight back today to restore my gun rights and help pave the way for other Americans to do the same.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/UBQqs_dgwBH9tVQ4xKmFNluxyOkxpkIQ-RAHmjpzcTzjd4qR4nRjtzsdibduo2skdXj8TXyK0jpdJ2oUrn7WJH99eOXjAoyIbFOLCPeGBgw2bXJY8CJZx1aHhUKZMNHb5dvA8zJngVeMJAqE9ePTZ0MjuhJ5XYYYhlkT8GVCTSMV4NepoAadmGqidI_oXhd95mDRR_rhKAoXYTzj20v7CyYGhs_yJk27bxtLh6h_izdNpr8cUTRqL2-Fr6-btbyjSB9TGYQzvSrmWOSrWiE-QQkf9jokEtl_gDzJyMs)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
© 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/un/z0Ny4zFZOGnoHy6jNAzkY6cBsLFXMVKUOt1i5J6EHF2Jl_QvL1MkgB9LcQHjb7EleiokodErt5mt0OoquJm2D-PzoPeGP0UwgfNMy_7HgTd-X3yigi5YEKkzdwZ2L-1Haw5Zb4g72X09VqxD)

---

name: Giffords.org
body:
#

Friends, we're emailing for $5.
Sorry for being so upfront, but we need your help to hit our 25,000 contribution fundraising goal by tomorrow at midnight. If we succeed, we'll have the resources to urge the Senate to pass universal background checks and put it on President Biden's desk.
$5 may not seem like a lot, but emails like this are how we receive a majority of our support. That means if you chip in $5, and the next person reading this email chips in $5 we'll have the resources we need to push for universal background checks in the Senate.
So, friends, here's the part where we ask:
[**Will you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC today? We 'll take that contribution and put it right to work passing the lifesaving bipartisan background checks bill that will be voted on in the Senate.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee11d/78fba3aa/62e58fea/50aad683/4043922843/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210330-1-full")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee11d/78fba3aa/62e58fea/50aad684/4043922843/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210330-1-full") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee11d/78fba3aa/62e58fea/50aad687/4043922843/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210330-1-full")

We need to pass background checks as soon as possible. For two years, a bipartisan bill sat on Mitch McConnell's desk, untouched. Thousands of lives could have been saved in those two years, so we need to act fast and make sure this bill is signed into law now.
Over 90% of Americans support universal background checks. It's time for the Senate to finally pass this legislation so we can begin to save lives.
Thank you in advance for chipping in,
Team Giffords

clean_body: Friends, we're emailing for $5. Sorry for being so upfront, but we need your help to hit our 25,000 contribution fundraising goal by tomorrow at midnight. If we succeed, we'll have the resources to urge the Senate to pass universal background checks and put it on President Biden's desk. $5 may not seem like a lot, but emails like this are how we receive a majority of our support. That means if you chip in $5, and the next person reading this email chips in $5 we'll have the resources we need to push for universal background checks in the Senate. So, friends, here's the part where we ask: "" If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" ---|--- We need to pass background checks as soon as possible. For two years, a bipartisan bill sat on Mitch McConnell's desk, untouched. Thousands of lives could have been saved in those two years, so we need to act fast and make sure this bill is signed into law now. Over 90% of Americans support universal background checks. It's time for the Senate to finally pass this legislation so we can begin to save lives. Thank you in advance for chipping in, Team Giffords "" *

I'm emailing you again because we checked the fundraising numbers this morning and things aren't looking good.
[****](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kXDbuu6SiCTjIaprYCMJ85RtPiQATpZ1505gYHU4MVKjXVAxMOYWbMBHvXhk9vlvKMPQ-tCpPjDkWXy021dvIZq1N5YdXQhXI9jllMfxAt5PbeF6CBEUCW8jPGDw25xAwwQ3WsfA6N_OVeIUKDaGdC_H1GOm-kvc8oPKVXuf0GDBwnd5l_havp9xyjS_7r4_2ZKMMvOvlyi56BKTO83I70T74BVfuF0nd5H7RgGxCBam9aWzh7gSZe1r0OZKW78xMD54c9lhabTuGyMFHrSIqwjgqPgEapY-nnq6_6gqnWzy0VAmhy29vkwIfWBMH-ZfIST9mp4efa6IV_3cAgJLzzBsY916nn2xb7AlxK_nyxvG_kwIBizrqySa5nBSpqGuHw1ngfGQC00kmy7RHNC0LvM3hFWOOGoNnRJxv9MqCSNHNPhSbVkDVnyQCKF4H6w_hYz4l7YzP3AmHw13yt5-TSDJ5tD4FIo8-cKKwCe3nm8QZGFcoys15A==&c=A2ppxl35VNrlLNRXtbmqZCkvy4tpl8Z_yW5E-aWiqbsyisevn-hAPw==&ch=UepZFJ-VMGaDsO3FGft2StFbiBOM8psWMuzVIyR0HrwMTwu2kTNOCA==)

I'm emailing you again because we checked the fundraising numbers this morning _**and things aren 't looking good.**_ In our fight to restore Trump's conservative majority, while holding back the leftist wave in Congress, we are in desperate need of critical resources.

**I 'll get right to the point: We are still behind on our critical End of Quarter goal.**

>From running advertisements to getting in touch with voters about the issues that matter most, all these tremendous efforts cannot be done without grassroots patriots like you. That's why meeting the goals that are set ARE SO IMPORTANT.

[**Will you rush your 2x matched contribution in support of this End of Quarter goal?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kXDbuu6SiCTjIaprYCMJ85RtPiQATpZ1505gYHU4MVKjXVAxMOYWbMBHvXhk9vlvKMPQ-tCpPjDkWXy021dvIZq1N5YdXQhXI9jllMfxAt5PbeF6CBEUCW8jPGDw25xAwwQ3WsfA6N_OVeIUKDaGdC_H1GOm-kvc8oPKVXuf0GDBwnd5l_havp9xyjS_7r4_2ZKMMvOvlyi56BKTO83I70T74BVfuF0nd5H7RgGxCBam9aWzh7gSZe1r0OZKW78xMD54c9lhabTuGyMFHrSIqwjgqPgEapY-nnq6_6gqnWzy0VAmhy29vkwIfWBMH-ZfIST9mp4efa6IV_3cAgJLzzBsY916nn2xb7AlxK_nyxvG_kwIBizrqySa5nBSpqGuHw1ngfGQC00kmy7RHNC0LvM3hFWOOGoNnRJxv9MqCSNHNPhSbVkDVnyQCKF4H6w_hYz4l7YzP3AmHw13yt5-TSDJ5tD4FIo8-cKKwCe3nm8QZGFcoys15A==&c=A2ppxl35VNrlLNRXtbmqZCkvy4tpl8Z_yW5E-aWiqbsyisevn-hAPw==&ch=UepZFJ-VMGaDsO3FGft2StFbiBOM8psWMuzVIyR0HrwMTwu2kTNOCA==)

I'm meeting with Congressman Luetkemeyer later today and I want to be able to give him good news. I want the rest of his team to see just how important our grassroots supporters are for reaching our End of Quarter goal.

[**Chip in now to have the most impact on how our story unfolds. We are counting on your support to see our fight through!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kXDbuu6SiCTjIaprYCMJ85RtPiQATpZ1505gYHU4MVKjXVAxMOYWbMBHvXhk9vlvKMPQ-tCpPjDkWXy021dvIZq1N5YdXQhXI9jllMfxAt5PbeF6CBEUCW8jPGDw25xAwwQ3WsfA6N_OVeIUKDaGdC_H1GOm-kvc8oPKVXuf0GDBwnd5l_havp9xyjS_7r4_2ZKMMvOvlyi56BKTO83I70T74BVfuF0nd5H7RgGxCBam9aWzh7gSZe1r0OZKW78xMD54c9lhabTuGyMFHrSIqwjgqPgEapY-nnq6_6gqnWzy0VAmhy29vkwIfWBMH-ZfIST9mp4efa6IV_3cAgJLzzBsY916nn2xb7AlxK_nyxvG_kwIBizrqySa5nBSpqGuHw1ngfGQC00kmy7RHNC0LvM3hFWOOGoNnRJxv9MqCSNHNPhSbVkDVnyQCKF4H6w_hYz4l7YzP3AmHw13yt5-TSDJ5tD4FIo8-cKKwCe3nm8QZGFcoys15A==&c=A2ppxl35VNrlLNRXtbmqZCkvy4tpl8Z_yW5E-aWiqbsyisevn-hAPw==&ch=UepZFJ-VMGaDsO3FGft2StFbiBOM8psWMuzVIyR0HrwMTwu2kTNOCA==)

Thank you for your support,

Chad
Team Luetkemeyer

Paid for by Blaine For Congress

| | Friend,
We know you recieve a lot of these emails, but this is important.

Our dad's first fundraising deadline is tomorrow night at midnight and he needs your help.

[Will you chip in $5, $15, $25 or more to help dad hit his first fundraising deadline?](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=64365b0c5d&e=d48ad6f8f4)

---
| Dad has taught us what it means to work hard, stand up for what you believe in and deliver on your promises.

Since he was elected, he's been fighting for Iowa's fourth district in Washington and the results speak for themselves.

Help our dad finish his first fundraising quarter strong by contributing any amount you can today!

See you on the campaign trail,

The Feenstra Kids

The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. Friend,
When the Governor of Colorado recently declared "Meatless Monday" in his state, I took a firm stand in support of the men and women in the livestock industry and declared it #MeatAllWeek in Oklahoma. In Oklahoma, we value and support our agriculture industry who give it their all to put healthy and affordable food on the dinner table.
But, it seems as though my endorsement of #MeatAllWeek has ruffled some feathers... PETA has taken quite an offense, calling me "**Governor Meathead** " and slandering me for supporting Oklahoma's way of life.
PETA and the Left want to tell you what you should and should not eat. I believe that it is in no way within the government's right or power to dictate what food you are choosing to eat.

clean_body: == Friend, When the Governor of Colorado recently declared "Meatless Monday" in his state, I took a firm stand in support of the men and women in the livestock industry and declared it #MeatAllWeek in Oklahoma. In Oklahoma, we value and support our agriculture industry who give it their all to put healthy and affordable food on the dinner table. But, it seems as though my endorsement of #MeatAllWeek has ruffled some feathers... PETA has taken quite an offense, calling me "Governor Meathead " and slandering me for supporting Oklahoma's way of life. PETA and the Left want to tell you what you should and should not eat. I believe that it is in no way within the government's right or power to dictate what food you are choosing to eat. == What do you think, Friend? Do you agree with me? ==. == == == == == == == I am counting on you, Friend. Thank you, Kevin Stitt Get involved with Team Stitt Today! Follow us on == and ==. == To receive text updates text JOINSTITT to 47682 == To PAID FOR BY STITT FOR GOVERNOR 2022 PO BOX 13738 Oklahoma City, OK 73113 | | STITT FOR GOVERNOR 2022 | PO BOX 13738, Oklahoma City, OK 73113 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

| | Hi ,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are fighting the radical Left and promoting GOOD America First Republicans! [We are changing the political landscape, and I need your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=927b6ff5b3&e=ba6e67b849)!

Sometimes, people ask me what kind of Republicans we DO support.

Amidst the craziness that is DC right now, we do have some superstars.... _patriots who fight for America First and aren't giving in to the Dems' extremism and the media's intimidation. _

**_We will support patriots like Lauren Boebert of Colorado, Marjorie Taylor Greene of Georgia, Bob Good of Virginia, and others like the Freedom Caucus and those loyal to God and America First!_**

These leaders are consistent, conservative heroes who fight for us. THAT is something that Drain the DC Swamp PAC can get behind!

Part of my job is to hold congress critters accountable by letting them know in no uncertain terms that you & I have RED LINES of political death that must NEVER be crossed: no gun grabbing, no history destroying, no LGTBQ special rights, no men dressed as women in the military!”

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Second-most expensive race in the county
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria’s re-election was the second-most expensive congressional race in November 2020.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210330-1981-header&t=1&akid=1981%2E2526796%2E4ORyPG)
Not many people know this, but Alexandria’s re-election was **the second-most expensive congressional race** in November 2020.
Republicans and establishment Democrats did everything they could to defeat her. First, she was up against a Wall Street-backed Democratic primary challenger with $3 million in the bank.
Then in the general election, her Republican opponent raised $10 million for his campaign. They threw every insult and lie her way — hoping she wouldn’t win re-election and instead become a flash-in-the-pan.
**But the good news is: their efforts didn’t work.** That’s because of the movement we’ve built and the grassroots donations from people like you that ensured we had the resources to fight back and organize.
Now the same forces are coming together to try to defeat Alexandria in 2022 with a new opponent just being announced.
[**We must be prepared now, and that starts with hitting our $3 million goal before our first FEC deadline tomorrow. Can you chip in $3 now to help us close the gap?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8454?refcode=em20210330-1981&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1981%2E2526796%2E4ORyPG)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8454?refcode=em20210330-1981&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1981%2E2526796%2E4ORyPG)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8454?refcode=em20210330-1981&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=1981%2E2526796%2E4ORyPG)**
It only takes $1 to get involved in a people-powered campaign like ours, and when you do, you immediately become part of a team of individuals all coming together for a common purpose: _to keep Alexandria in Congress where she can continue to fight for us and our families._
Not only did Alexandria crush the competition with nearly 73% of the vote, we helped grow our progressive voice with the election of Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush.
**Your support right now will help us gear up for our own election and also elect even more champions like Nina Turner to Congress.**
[**Can you please make your first $3 donation today to help us hit our $3 million goal before midnight tomorrow?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8454?refcode=em20210330-1981&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=1981%2E2526796%2E4ORyPG)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8454?refcode=em20210330-1981&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1981%2E2526796%2E4ORyPG)**
With appreciation,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210330-1981-footer&t=25&refcode2=1981_2526796_4ORyPG&akid=1981%2E2526796%2E4ORyPG)**

Then in the general election, her Republican opponent raised $10 million for his campaign. They threw every insult and lie her way — hoping she wouldn’t win re-election and instead become a flash-in-the-pan. But the good news is: their efforts didn’t work. That’s because of the movement we’ve built and the grassroots donations from people like you that ensured we had the resources to fight back and organize. Now the same forces are coming together to try to defeat Alexandria in 2022 with a new opponent just being announced. It only takes $1 to get involved in a people-powered campaign like ours, and when you do, you immediately become part of a team of individuals all coming together for a common purpose: to keep Alexandria in Congress where she can continue to fight for us and our families. Not only did Alexandria crush the competition with nearly 73% of the vote, we helped grow our progressive voice with the election of Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush. Your support right now will help us gear up for our own election and also elect even more champions like Nina Turner to Congress. With appreciation, Team AOC | | Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Peter - we wanted to share two quick updates with you:

Gov. John Kasich recently spoke about how President Biden needs to try harder if he hopes to keep his promise about working to find bipartisan solutions to our nation's challenges. Passing a $1.9 trillion spending bill without a single Republican vote isn't a promising start.

And yes, there is blame to go around on both sides but getting this done requires stronger leadership. It is achievable and critical for our nation's health. [Watch the clip here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=685e7875d94f45a38933ac53b5dfaaee&_e=ft0j9QjFfGlESY9ZV-baWPIt4uldgFasB0IAgpcgHyETolxWQ58mLcCmOx0pGcgKuZfAUNPOsOcLQt7UxqSuYCjZkKIvVYMJs3Na_gVBvqS5we18ArB1ej1yjrei20hUsSYUnEuGAhnrs0qDYVus6unCj9WrMOYwr3_f6HGLC4rJHMue_1hoprKKM_KumpJktVJOUcEZzknqN2Ez3fhp9waEoDmcFSHO6Zc8sebhTusUyIFitkdpTL9MwyxJwH7VOPar4024HEHgCNlBGQ_DnkvWHskF5WfsEzv6CRkSE-OTv7STuDa5CEO5zKCWgD4U) and please consider sharing it.

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Fetterman?=
subject: quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
It’s John Fetterman again. 👋
Look, I’ll keep this quick. **On Wednesday, March 31 at midnight (TOMORROW!) our campaign is required by federal law to make our Q1 fundraising numbers public.**
This is our *first-ever* FEC filing deadline, and the first _realllllly_ big test of our campaign. The amount of money we raise will set the tone of this Senate race and determine how many Pennsylvania voters we can reach early-on.
[_As I write this, there are a little more than 24 hours until the deadline. Can you make a donation of $15 or more to our campaign right now? You donating *any amount* before the deadline is even more important than how much you can donate._](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=2ef06fde5c&e=0490676c9f) 👇
**[Contribute $25](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=db71f3e9f2&e=0490676c9f)**
Believe me when I say that reporters and super PACs (and TBH, the PA GOP flag police) are eagerly awaiting to learn how much money our team has raised since we launched.
And I gotta be honest. **If we want to be *the* grassroots campaign in a crowded race for the most important Senate seat of 2022, then we need to report more money than our opponents.**
I know we have the team out there to make it happen. We’re doing this the right way — no corporate PACS allowed. The only way we can win is with lots of small online donations from people like you.
[**_Are you with me? Yes? Boom. Make a donation of $15 or more to our campaign right now._**](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=397404a16e&e=0490676c9f)
**[Contribute $25](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=9b6b46514a&e=0490676c9f)**
[](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=b28ad2f39e&e=0490676c9f)
Thanks for all you do. I’m so grateful for your support. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Donate](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=d03a40dbd2&e=0490676c9f)**
---
Paid for by Fetterman for PA
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=4050384552&e=0490676c9f). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=864dcb2a0a&e=0490676c9f&c=1fd92acc51). Mail us: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh.
