name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Loomer?=
subject: Huge Laura Loomer BREAKING NEWS NOW!
body:
Did you hear the latest that Big-Tech did to retaliate against US Congressional Candidate Laura Loomer while she was helping out on Desantis' bill? | | | **They are trying to stop us from Saving America!**
---
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot,

_**I want you to be the first to hear**_ what just happened to me and also know how much your support means to me. On Monday March 29, 2021, I was once again speaking in Tallahassee, Florida regarding Governor DeSantis' proposed FL legislation to hold Big-Tech accountable for censoring Floridians and candidates.

BIG TECH WAS WATCHING
---
| Literally **_minutes_** after I voiced my concerns about loopholes in the legislation, arguing that it should also include penalties for payment processors and banks that discriminate against conservatives and ban them, I was informed via email that Stripe, a payment processor that I was using to process donations, and the same payment processor that is used by the RNC and NRCC through their fundraising platform WinRed, _**BANNED ME as a US Congressional Candidate**_ for **NO** legitimate reason.

**If you recall, Stripe also recently banned President Donald Trump, yet for some unknown reason, the Republican Party has continued to use Stripe. This is unacceptable.**

To help people understand this better, imagine out of the blue VISA or Mastercard decided that you could no longer use them simply because of your political views. Imagine the turmoil that would cause you, your livelihood, or your business!

This was done to me intentionally to damage my candidacy and business, and I believe it was strategically timed as a form of **_immediate retaliation_** because I exercised my 1st amendment rights again, at the Florida State Capitol yesterday in front of numerous Florida lawmakers and grassroots activists, and I demanded Big Tech, including Stripe, be held accountable and not be permitted to interfere in our elections! To top it off, Stripe banned me as a Jewish American Republican candidate during Passover.

We are making great progress towards hitting our campaign's first quarter fundraising goal, and I know Big Tech would love nothing more than to watch us fail. **_Before_** they try to shut my voice down completely as a candidate, **I really need your[generous support](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=1d47042d6c&e=4d7c0901a7)! **Let Big Tech know we won’t allow them to pick and choose election winners and losers! Can I count on you to contribute [$25](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=d332bafd51&e=4d7c0901a7), [$50](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=50d18735ad&e=4d7c0901a7), [$100](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=05c157fc62&e=4d7c0901a7), or a max donation of [$2,900](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=df3dd759ec&e=4d7c0901a7) today to help my campaign hit our first quarter goal?
---
| [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=7104fe9e06&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
| **LET’S SAVE AMERICA TOGETHER AND BREAK UP BIG TECH!**
---
| Thank you so much for your support!

Truthfully
---
|
---
| | Laura Loomer
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 www.Loomer2022.com, All rights reserved._

Laura Loomer for Congress, Inc.
720 Lucerne Ave #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=a472b61287) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=a472b61287).
---

name: Defend FITN
subject: Defend our FITN Primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Democrats want to put an end to the New Hampshire FITN primary; sign the petition to defend our New Hampshire values.
Derek,

Our Federal Delegation needs to decide if they stand with New Hampshire or with Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer.

In expressing their support for HR1, a bill which seeks to impose federal control over our elections, Maggie Hassan and Jeanne Shaheen have AGAIN failed to reflect the priorities of their constituents. HR1 is not only in direct opposition to the New Hampshire state laws, which requires that our Presidential Primary be the first in the nation, it would also impose additional measures, including universal no-excuse absentee voting, something which has already been rejected by our New Hampshire legislators.

HR1 puts New York and California in charge of OUR elections, and would all but guarantee the end of our First in the Nation Primary. Check out what former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo had to say about HR1 and the effect it’ll have on our FITN Primary:

[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefend-fitn/1/0100017884d7586f-9278ac8b-9993-40a4-88d1-6474678fb34e-000000/ywZR3FOI7eaCvtKgQJMkcUFzG8E=207)

HR1 is nothing more than a Democrat power-grab, and it’s backed by those who supposedly represent New Hampshire.

Please sign the petition below. It’s time to hold Maggie Hassan and Jeanne Shaheen accountable and call on them to REJECT HR1.

[DEFEND our FITN Primary](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefend-fitn/2/0100017884d7586f-9278ac8b-9993-40a4-88d1-6474678fb34e-000000/R2LLFDyTRewWN6WDcDYfiO9B2tc=207)

[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefend-fitn/3/0100017884d7586f-9278ac8b-9993-40a4-88d1-6474678fb34e-000000/aXK62kR-QjnrddfLXE8PAtyAXrQ=207)

name: Moms Against Antisemitism
subject: Out of Darkness Comes Hope and Light
body:
Passover and Holy Week bring more meaning this year and we must recommit ourselves to fighting for the freedom of others. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26976536/278654296/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzY2YWIxLWI4OTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DaZWc3xNh_cD4ivQw4rDhdJ0uVxDXQm3lqv3SNQR4nw=&emci=120cb954-ae91-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=e4766ab1-b891-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131) _ _ **This is a time for hope...** Hi Peter, Communities across the country began celebrating Passover and Holy Week a few days ago marking the second year in a row that we are celebrating our holidays during a pandemic. Passover celebrates freedom and redemption and these words have a special meaning this year. While families can't gather to have a traditional Seder together, we can all hope that there is light after darkness and we can**[recommit ourselves to fighting for the freedom of others](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26976537/278654297/561362393?refcode=passover&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzY2YWIxLWI4OTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DaZWc3xNh_cD4ivQw4rDhdJ0uVxDXQm3lqv3SNQR4nw=). ** The effects and limitations of the virus are still distressing, but what's different this year is the feeling of optimism and hope that next year will be better and brighter. At the end of the Seder, it's customary to say ‘next year in Jerusalem’, and this year many families are also adding, ‘next year in person' to this tradition. While social distancing guidelines will no longer be in place this time next year with a successful vaccine rollout, the concerns of the Jewish community about safety in light of the alarming rise of anti-Semitic attacks in our country will remain. [**This is why today I am asking you Peter to recommit ourselves to fighting for the freedom of others so that all communities in America can celebrate their holidays in person and in peace next year.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26976538/278654298/561362393?refcode=passover&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzY2YWIxLWI4OTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DaZWc3xNh_cD4ivQw4rDhdJ0uVxDXQm3lqv3SNQR4nw=) I believe that we can't be free until everyone can live with dignity, equality and justice in our country. I am asking you to join me in this fight against anti-Semitism because it will take all of us to win this battle.**[Will you chip in today to support Moms Against Antisemitism and The Jewish Democratic Council of America? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26976539/278654299/561362393?refcode=passover&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzY2YWIxLWI4OTEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DaZWc3xNh_cD4ivQw4rDhdJ0uVxDXQm3lqv3SNQR4nw=) ** Passover tells the story of overcoming adversity and finding hope. It is a celebration of freedom calling on all of us to recognize that none of us are free until everyone is free. Please join me in this fight for freedom by chipping in what you can today. Thank you! clean_body: Passover and Holy Week bring more meaning this year and we must recommit ourselves to fighting for the freedom of others. This is a time for hope... Hi Peter, Communities across the country began celebrating Passover and Holy Week a few days ago marking the second year in a row that we are celebrating our holidays during a pandemic. Passover celebrates freedom and redemption and these words have a special meaning this year. While families can't gather to have a traditional Seder together, we can all hope that there is light after darkness and we can=. The effects and limitations of the virus are still distressing, but what's different this year is the feeling of optimism and hope that next year will be better and brighter. At the end of the Seder, it's customary to say ‘next year in Jerusalem’, and this year many families are also adding, ‘next year in person' to this tradition. While social distancing guidelines will no longer be in place this time next year with a successful vaccine rollout, the concerns of the Jewish community about safety in light of the alarming rise of anti-Semitic attacks in our country will remain. = I believe that we can't be free until everyone can live with dignity, equality and justice in our country. I am asking you to join me in this fight against anti-Semitism because it will take all of us to win this battle.= Passover tells the story of overcoming adversity and finding hope. It is a celebration of freedom calling on all of us to recognize that none of us are free until everyone is free. Please join me in this fight for freedom by chipping in what you can today. Thank you! Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director, Moms in Office = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Giffords.org
subject: good news and bad news
body:
#

Friends, we have some good news, and some bad news. Let us explain.
**The good news is: **So far, thousands of you have donated to support our efforts to pass universal background checks in the Senate. Each of your donations brings us one step closer to passing this crucial legislation.
**The bad news is:** This bill is already facing some tough opposition in the Senate. Which is why we can't afford to miss our goal. We need every last donation to put up a monumental effort to urge the Senate to act, and act now.
**So before our deadline tomorrow we need to ask:**
[**Will you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC today? We 'll take that contribution and put it right to work passing lifesaving universal background checks in the Senate.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee161/78fba3aa/628eeeee/50aad90b/1760393492/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210330-2-full")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee161/78fba3aa/628eeeee/50aad90c/1760393492/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210330-2-full") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee161/78fba3aa/628eeeee/50aad90f/1760393492/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210330-2-full")
---|---
[Donate $50](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee161/78fba3aa/628eeeee/50aad90e/1760393492/VEsHAw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210330-2-full") | [Donate $100](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee161/78fba3aa/628eeeee/50aad901/1760393492/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210330-2-full")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee161/78fba3aa/628eeeee/50aad900/1760393492/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210330-2-full") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee161/78fba3aa/628eeeee/50aad90d/1760393492/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210330-2-full")
---|---
Universal background checks have passed in the House twice. But the first time, the bill sat on Mitch McConnell's desk in the Senate for two years while lives were lost that could have been saved if this bill was signed into law.
That's why we are asking for your donation. If you can help us meet this goal, we'll have the resources we need to put up a winning fight in the Senate and get universal background checks passed into law.
Thank you for standing with us,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee161/78fba3aa/628eeeee/50aad90b/1760393492/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210330-2-full")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee161/78fba3aa/628eeeee/50aad903/1760393492/VEsEBA/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.
